attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SLFA.LCAT_FRGT_ACTVTY_OUTBOUND_KEY AS LCAT_FRGT_ACTVTY_OUTBOUND_KEY,
COALESCE(SSED.FREIGHT_PAID,0)  AS FREIGHT_PAID_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SSED.FREIGHT_RATED,0) AS FRGT_RT_BASED_CHARGE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SSED.FREIGHT_BILLED,0) AS FREIGHT_BILLED_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(SSED.SHIPMENT_TYPE,'UNK') AS SHIPMENT_LEG_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(SSED.DESTINATION_CITY,'UNKNOWN') AS DESTINATION_CITY_NAME,
COALESCE(SSED.ACTUAL_SHIPSET_WEIGHT,-999) AS  ACTUAL_SHIPSET_WEIGHT_KG_AMT,
COALESCE(SSED.DIM_WEIGHT,-999) AS DIMENSIONAL_WEIGHT_KG_AMT,
SSED.ACTIVITY_ID  AS SK_ACTIVITY_ID_INT,
SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER AS BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS SHIP_FROM_INV_ORG_KEY,
COALESCE(SSED.SHIPPING_COUNTRY,'UNK') AS SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS  FREIGHT_CARRIER_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
(CASE WHEN NLFA.LCAT_FRGT_ACTVTY_OUTBOUND_KEY IS NOT NULL  THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) AS DML_TYPE 
/* Added as part of FY14 June monthly release BY viyerra ON 14-May-2014*/ 
,COALESCE(SSED.FREIGHT_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS GL_FREIGHT_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(SSED.GL_FREIGHT, 0) AS GL_FREIGHT_USD_COST
,(CASE WHEN SSED.ATTRIBUTE15 IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS ORIGINAL_SOURCE_SJPROD_FLG
,COALESCE(SSED.FREIGHT_PLANNED,0) as FREIGHT_PLANNED_USD_COST
FROM
(
SELECT 
SCXDDHS.ACTIVITY_ID,
SCXDDHS.ACTUAL_SHIPSET_WEIGHT,
SCXDDHS.DIM_WEIGHT,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
SCXDDHS.ORDER_NUMBER,
SCXDDHS.SHIP_FROM_ORG,
SCXDDHS.DESTINATION_CITY,
SCXDDHS.SHIPPING_COUNTRY,
/* Added as part of FY14 April monthly release*/
SUBSTR(freight_code,index(freight_code,'_') +1) AS DRVD_FRGHT_CODE,
CASE WHEN INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-') = 0  AND INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'_') = 0 THEN FREIGHT_CODE
WHEN INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'00000') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(SUBSTR(DRVD_FRGHT_CODE, 1) ,1,index(SUBSTR(DRVD_FRGHT_CODE, 1) ,'_')-1) 
ELSE SUBSTR(FREIGHT_CODE,0,INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-')) END  AS FREIGHT_CODE,
/*
CASE WHEN INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-') = 0 THEN FREIGHT_CODE
ELSE SUBSTR(FREIGHT_CODE,0,INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-')) END as FREIGHT_CODE,
*/
SCXDDHS.SHIPMENT_TYPE,
SCXDDHS.FREIGHT_PAID,
SCXDDHS.FREIGHT_BILLED,
SCXDDHS.FREIGHT_RATED,
/* Added as part of FY14 June monthly release BY viyerra ON 14-May-2014*/ 
SCXDDHS.FREIGHT_TYPE,
SCXDDHS.GL_FREIGHT,
SCXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE15,
SCXDDHS.FREIGHT_PLANNED
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_FREIT_ACTIVITY SCXDDHS 
 UNION 
SELECT 
ECXDDHS.ACTIVITY_ID,
ECXDDHS.ACTUAL_SHIPSET_WEIGHT,
ECXDDHS.DIM_WEIGHT,
ECXDDHS.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,
ECXDDHS.ORDER_NUMBER,
ECXDDHS.SHIP_FROM_ORG,
ECXDDHS.DESTINATION_CITY,
ECXDDHS.SHIPPING_COUNTRY,

/* Added as part of FY14 April monthly release*/
SUBSTR(freight_code,index(freight_code,'_') +1) AS DRVD_FRGHT_CODE,
CASE WHEN INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-') = 0  AND INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'_') = 0 THEN FREIGHT_CODE
WHEN INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'00000') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(SUBSTR(DRVD_FRGHT_CODE, 1) ,1,index(SUBSTR(DRVD_FRGHT_CODE, 1) ,'_')-1) 
ELSE SUBSTR(FREIGHT_CODE,0,INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-')) END  AS FREIGHT_CODE,
/*End of changes */

/* FREIGHT_CODE,*/
ECXDDHS.SHIPMENT_TYPE,
ECXDDHS.FREIGHT_PAID,
ECXDDHS.FREIGHT_BILLED,
ECXDDHS.FREIGHT_RATED,
/* Added as part of FY14 June monthly release BY viyerra ON 14-May-2014*/ 
ECXDDHS.FREIGHT_TYPE,
ECXDDHS.GL_FREIGHT,
ECXDDHS.ATTRIBUTE15,
ECXDDHS.FREIGHT_PLANNED
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_DV_FREIT_ACTIVITY  ECXDDHS WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI' 
 )SSED
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_LCAT_FRGT_ACTIVITY_OUTBOUND SLFA
ON SLFA.SK_ACTIVITY_ID_INT=SSED.ACTIVITY_ID
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON SSED.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND cast(trim(SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER) as integer)=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FREIGHT_CARRIER NFC
ON SSED.FREIGHT_CODE=NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON SSED.SHIP_FROM_ORG=NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_LCAT_FRGT_ACTIVITY_OUTBOUND NLFA
ON NLFA.SK_ACTIVITY_ID_INT=SSED.ACTIVITY_ID
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SSED.ACTIVITY_ID ORDER BY SSED.ORDER_NUMBER,SSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER  DESC) = 1

SELECT  RANK () OVER (ORDER BY SSD.ACTIVITY_ID) + MAX_VAL LCAT_FRGT_ACTVTY_OUTBOUND_KEY,
SSD.ACTIVITY_ID AS SK_ACTIVITY_ID_INT
FROM  
 (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (LCAT_FRGT_ACTVTY_OUTBOUND_KEY), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_LCAT_FRGT_ACTIVITY_OUTBOUND) SSDO,
(SELECT SSSED.ACTIVITY_ID,SSSED.ORDER_NUMBER,SSSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER,SSSED.FREIGHT_CODE
          FROM (SELECT ACTIVITY_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,SHIP_SET_NUMBER,CASE WHEN INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-') = 0 THEN FREIGHT_CODE
ELSE SUBSTR(FREIGHT_CODE,0,INDEX(FREIGHT_CODE,'-')) END as FREIGHT_CODE
                  FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_FREIT_ACTIVITY    
UNION ALL
SELECT ACTIVITY_ID,ORDER_NUMBER,SHIP_SET_NUMBER,FREIGHT_CODE                  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXSCM_DV_FREIT_ACTIVITY 
                                                             
               ) SSSED
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON SSSED.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SHIPSET  NS
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NS.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND SSSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER=NS.BK_SHIP_SET_NUM_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FREIGHT_CARRIER NFC
ON SSSED.FREIGHT_CODE=NFC.BK_CARRIER_ID
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY  SSSED.ACTIVITY_ID ORDER BY SSSED.ORDER_NUMBER,SSSED.SHIP_SET_NUMBER  DESC) = 1
) SSD
WHERE NOT EXISTS (      SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_LCAT_FRGT_ACTIVITY_OUTBOUND SSSD
                                                                                WHERE SSSD.SK_ACTIVITY_ID_INT = SSD.ACTIVITY_ID
                                                   )

SELECT SGDFA.CISCO_BATCH_ID, SGDFA.ORDER_NUMBER, SGDFA.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, SGDFA.PO_NUMBER, SGDFA.SHIP_DATE, SGDFA.FREIGHT_CODE
, SGDFA.DESCRIPTION, SGDFA.FREIGHT_TERM, SGDFA.FREIGHT_AMOUNT, SGDFA.HEADER_ID, SGDFA.SELLING_PRICE, SGDFA.ROUTING_OPTION, SGDFA.PRODUCT_FAMILY, SGDFA.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP, SGDFA.BUSINESS_UNIT, SGDFA.ACTUAL_SHIPSET_WEIGHT, SGDFA.DIM_WEIGHT, SGDFA.FREIGHT_BILLED, SGDFA.FREIGHT_PAID, SGDFA.THEATRE, SGDFA.SHIP_FROM_ORG, SGDFA.SHIP_TO_ORG, SGDFA.COGS_ACCOUNT, SGDFA.SYSTEM_WEIGHT, SGDFA.DESTINATION_CITY, SGDFA.SHIPPING_ZIP, SGDFA.SHIPPING_COUNTRY, SGDFA.RECEIPT_ZIP, SGDFA.RECEIPT_COUNTRY, SGDFA.RECEIPT_COMPANY, SGDFA.DEPARTMENT, SGDFA.SHIP_FROM_ID, SGDFA.SHIP_TO_ID, SGDFA.SHIPMENT_TYPE, SGDFA.CARTON_ID, SGDFA.CARTON_WEIGHT, SGDFA.FREIGHT_RATED, SGDFA.TRACKING_NUMBER, SGDFA.GL_FREIGHT, SGDFA.OTOR_PO_QUANTITY, SGDFA.REQUEST_ID, SGDFA.CREATED_BY, SGDFA.CREATION_DATE, SGDFA.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SGDFA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SGDFA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SGDFA.MATCHING_FLAG, SGDFA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, SGDFA.HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL, SGDFA.INVOICE_DATE, SGDFA.INVOICE_NUMBER, SGDFA.RUN_DATE, SGDFA.SERVICE_LEVEL, SGDFA.SHIP_FROM_REGION_CODE, SGDFA.SHIP_FROM_NAME, SGDFA.SHIP_TO_NAME, SGDFA.SJ_ACTIVITY_ID, SGDFA.SHIP_TO_REGION_CODE, SGDFA.ACTIVITY_ID, SGDFA.CISCO_IB_BATCH_ID, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE1, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE2, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE3, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE4, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE5, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE6, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE7, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE8, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE9, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE10, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE11, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE12, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE13, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE14, SGDFA.ATTRIBUTE15
, GLOBAL_NAME, SGDFA.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, SGDFA.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, SGDFA.REFRESH_DATETIME
,  'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
, SGDFA.FREIGHT_TYPE
, SGDFA.FREIGHT_PLANNED
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXSCM_DV_FREIT_ACTIVITY SGDFA 
  where 
 NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM   $$WORKDB.W_LCAT_FRGT_ACTIVITY_OUTBOUND WLFAO
 WHERE SGDFA.ACTIVITY_ID = WLFAO.SK_ACTIVITY_ID_INT)
